name: Quota And Filesystem Triage
summary: Diagnose quota, inode, and filesystem-space failures from user-visible evidence.
description: This skill gives users and support teams a read-only checklist for storage-related failures such as full filesystems, quota limits, inode exhaustion, and path permission errors.

inputs.name: target_path
inputs.description: Directory whose filesystem, inode usage, and permissions should be inspected.

inputs.name: log_file
inputs.description: Optional job or application log with storage-related error messages.

outputs.name: filesystem_triage_report
outputs.description: Read-only evidence about capacity, inode usage, quota command availability, path permissions, and log clues.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Run against a user-owned directory and sample log, then confirm no filesystem state is changed.
